claim.statement: The production Cloudflare deployment workflow now executes the provider-diagnostic redaction test before readiness probing or deployment.

verification.route: GitHub contents API refetch at exact commit
verification.ordering: inside Test deployment evidence contracts, before Validate deployment branch input and before Cloudflare access or deployment steps

limits: Source verification does not prove the test passed in GitHub Actions.
